name: multiplayer-and-servers
description: How to help the user play with friends — join a server, reason about why a server seems unreachable, set up LAN play, and match version/mods with the server. Use when the user mentions multiplayer, joining a server, LAN, or playing with friends ("联机","进服","服务器","局域网","一起玩").
body:
# Multiplayer & servers

Connect the user; no ping tool — reason from what they report, never claim to test it.

## Reachability
Saved servers = `servers.dat` (NBT) in the run dir; ask for the address if unavailable. Ask
what they see (timeout/refused/version mismatch/kick reason) and reason from it.

## Matching the client
- Version mismatch = #1 cause → new instance via `create-instance`, don't edit in place.
- Modded server → get its mod/modpack list, install via `mods-install`/`modpacks-install`.
- Online-mode ("正版验证") needs a Microsoft account → `account(action=microsoft_login)` if
  only offline accounts exist.
- Whitelist ("白名单") is a SEPARATE server-owner-only list, unrelated to online-mode; ask the
  owner to add the exact username.

## LAN play
Host: singleplayer → Esc → "对局域网开放". Guest: auto-detected or `<host-ip>:<port>`
(`list_local_ip` for the IP). Offline accounts need different usernames; cross-network needs
a real server or VPN tool (Hamachi/ZeroTier).
